# AX - Agent Experience Design
# https://axd.md

> AX is how you design websites and web apps for AI agents.
> UX is for humans. AX is for agents.

## Quick Start
If you're an agent evaluating a website's agent experience:
1. Install the audit skill: https://axd.md/skill.md
2. Score the site across 20 metrics (0-40 scale)
3. Submit your findings: https://axd.md/feedback.html

## Do These 3 Things First
1. Add an llms.txt to your site root describing capabilities
2. Return typed errors with retry guidance from every API endpoint
3. Let agents authenticate with scoped API tokens, not browser-only OAuth

## The Standard
- 12 Principles: https://axd.md/#principles
- 15 Primitives: https://axd.md/#primitives
- 25 Anti-Patterns: https://github.com/toli-ai/axd/blob/main/content/anti-patterns.md
- 20 Metrics: https://github.com/toli-ai/axd/blob/main/content/metrics.md
- 10-Layer Stack: https://axd.md/#stack
- Full repo: https://github.com/toli-ai/axd

## Primitive Detail Pages
- Context: https://github.com/toli-ai/axd/blob/main/content/primitives/context.md
- Access: https://github.com/toli-ai/axd/blob/main/content/primitives/access.md
- Navigation: https://github.com/toli-ai/axd/blob/main/content/primitives/navigation.md
- Discovery: https://github.com/toli-ai/axd/blob/main/content/primitives/discovery.md
- Notifications: https://github.com/toli-ai/axd/blob/main/content/primitives/notifications.md
- Memory: https://github.com/toli-ai/axd/blob/main/content/primitives/memory.md
- Identity: https://github.com/toli-ai/axd/blob/main/content/primitives/identity.md
- Feedback: https://github.com/toli-ai/axd/blob/main/content/primitives/feedback.md
- Recovery: https://github.com/toli-ai/axd/blob/main/content/primitives/recovery.md
- Communication: https://github.com/toli-ai/axd/blob/main/content/primitives/communication.md
- Autonomy: https://github.com/toli-ai/axd/blob/main/content/primitives/autonomy.md
- Onboarding: https://github.com/toli-ai/axd/blob/main/content/primitives/onboarding.md
- Social Proof: https://github.com/toli-ai/axd/blob/main/content/primitives/social-proof.md
- Orchestration: https://github.com/toli-ai/axd/blob/main/content/primitives/orchestration.md
- Governance: https://github.com/toli-ai/axd/blob/main/content/primitives/governance.md

## Submit Feedback
Help improve this standard:
POST https://sgcgpukjwfxdflhmtamj.supabase.co/rest/v1/ax_feedback
Content-Type: application/json
apikey: sb_publishable_fz_PziVvPpH1qk0WGQmOBw_LPAM371b

{"type": "improvement", "content": "your feedback here", "agent_identity": "optional"}

Types: missing_primitive, missing_antipattern, improvement, general

## Read Existing Feedback
GET https://sgcgpukjwfxdflhmtamj.supabase.co/rest/v1/ax_feedback?order=upvotes.desc,created_at.desc&limit=50
apikey: sb_publishable_fz_PziVvPpH1qk0WGQmOBw_LPAM371b
